item.title: She Was Pregnant And No One Knew
item.description: In 2017, Brooke Skylar Richardson secretly gave birth shortly after her high school prom, and the newborn was later found buried in her family's backyard. The case drew national attention because of conflicting medical testimony, questions surrounding the infant's death, and the highly publicized trial that followed.

media:content.media:title: She Was Pregnant And No One Knew
media:content.media:description: In 2017, Brooke Skylar Richardson secretly gave birth shortly after her high school prom, and the newborn was later found buried in her family's backyard. The case drew national attention because of conflicting medical testimony, questions surrounding the infant's death, and the highly publicized trial that followed.

item.title: The Unsolved Murder Of Georgia Leah Moses
item.description: In 1997, Georgia Leah Moses was found dead near Petenwell Lake in Wisconsin. Years later, investigators revisited the case and reclassified her death as a homicide after identifying significant concerns with the original investigation. Her family, especially her sister, continues to seek justice and answers in the decades-old unsolved case.

media:content.media:title: The Unsolved Murder Of Georgia Leah Moses
media:content.media:description: In 1997, Georgia Leah Moses was found dead near Petenwell Lake in Wisconsin. Years later, investigators revisited the case and reclassified her death as a homicide after identifying significant concerns with the original investigation. Her family, especially her sister, continues to seek justice and answers in the decades-old unsolved case.

item.title: The Mystery Of Bryce Laspisa Still Has No Answers
item.description: Bryce Laspisa disappeared in August 2013 after a series of unusual events during a drive from Northern California toward his family's home. His vehicle was later found crashed near Castaic Lake, but Bryce was nowhere to be found. Despite years of searches and public appeals, his disappearance remains unsolved.

media:content.media:title: The Mystery Of Bryce Laspisa Still Has No Answers
media:content.media:description: Bryce Laspisa disappeared in August 2013 after a series of unusual events during a drive from Northern California toward his family's home. His vehicle was later found crashed near Castaic Lake, but Bryce was nowhere to be found. Despite years of searches and public appeals, his disappearance remains unsolved.

item.title: The Case That Left Neighbors Searching For Answers
item.description: In 2024, Ron Whiles was found dead at one of his rental properties in Ohio after going to check on a tenant. Investigators quickly identified a suspect, and the case led to a multi-state search before an arrest was made. The investigation drew widespread attention because of Whiles' reputation in the community and the circumstances surrounding his death.

media:content.media:title: The Case That Left Neighbors Searching For Answers
media:content.media:description: In 2024, Ron Whiles was found dead at one of his rental properties in Ohio after going to check on a tenant. Investigators quickly identified a suspect, and the case led to a multi-state search before an arrest was made. The investigation drew widespread attention because of Whiles' reputation in the community and the circumstances surrounding his death.

item.title: The Curse Of Ötzi The Iceman
item.description: Ötzi, the remarkably preserved natural mummy discovered in the Alps in 1991, has been linked by popular media to a supposed "curse" after several people connected to the discovery later died. Scientists, however, regard the alleged curse as a coincidence rather than evidence of anything supernatural. The story continues to fascinate as a blend of archaeology, history, and modern folklore.

media:content.media:title: The Curse Of Ötzi The Iceman
media:content.media:description: Ötzi, the remarkably preserved natural mummy discovered in the Alps in 1991, has been linked by popular media to a supposed "curse" after several people connected to the discovery later died. Scientists, however, regard the alleged curse as a coincidence rather than evidence of anything supernatural. The story continues to fascinate as a blend of archaeology, history, and modern folklore.

item.title: An Online Romance Ended In Tragedy
item.description: In 2017, Anna Repkina traveled from Russia to Oregon to meet a man she believed she would marry. Instead, investigators uncovered a deadly love triangle involving William Hargrove and his former fiancée. The case drew international attention and ultimately led to Hargrove’s conviction for murder.

media:content.media:title: An Online Romance Ended In Tragedy
media:content.media:description: In 2017, Anna Repkina traveled from Russia to Oregon to meet a man she believed she would marry. Instead, investigators uncovered a deadly love triangle involving William Hargrove and his former fiancée. The case drew international attention and ultimately led to Hargrove’s conviction for murder.

item.title: She Was Released Into The Night And Vanished
item.description: Mitrice Richardson disappeared in September 2009 after being released from custody by the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department in the early morning hours. Nearly a year later, her remains were discovered in a remote area of the Malibu Canyon. The circumstances surrounding her disappearance and death remain the subject of ongoing public discussion and unanswered questions.

media:content.media:title: She Was Released Into The Night And Vanished
media:content.media:description: Mitrice Richardson disappeared in September 2009 after being released from custody by the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department in the early morning hours. Nearly a year later, her remains were discovered in a remote area of the Malibu Canyon. The circumstances surrounding her disappearance and death remain the subject of ongoing public discussion and unanswered questions.

item.title: The Crime That Changed Juvenile Justice
item.description: In 1993, four year old Derrick Robie was abducted and killed in Savona, New York. Eleven year old Eric Smith was later arrested, confessed, and convicted, making the case one of the most widely discussed juvenile homicide cases in the United States. It continues to be referenced in discussions about youth violence, rehabilitation, and the justice system.

media:content.media:title: The Crime That Changed Juvenile Justice
media:content.media:description: In 1993, four year old Derrick Robie was abducted and killed in Savona, New York. Eleven year old Eric Smith was later arrested, confessed, and convicted, making the case one of the most widely discussed juvenile homicide cases in the United States. It continues to be referenced in discussions about youth violence, rehabilitation, and the justice system.
